title: Spicy Pulled Pork Recipe
ingredients: 5-7 pounds pork shoulder or pork butt
2 cans (7 oz.) chipotle peppers in adobo sauce
instructions: Chop onion into wedges and place in bottom of crock pot.
Rinse pork butt and liberally dress with kosher salt and black pepper, rubbing it into the meat.
Place pork butt on top of onions.
Using a garlic press, place garlic on top of meat.
Dump the chipotle peppers in adobo sauce on top.
Pour in 2 cans Dr. Pepper and add brown sugar.
Cook on low in crock pot for 10 hours.
Remove meat from crock pot and shred.
Place shredded meat back in sauce in crock pot.
Serve on rolls or in tortillas.
source_file: Spicy pulled pork recipe – Recipe for Mark.docx
